patterns: Pattern: Electron Desktop App (electron-vite + tipc IPC) — NOT a web monorepo. Main process in src/main/, renderer in src/renderer/, shared types in src/shared/
Pattern: IPC via @egoist/tipc — Router exported from src/main/tipc.ts with typed procedures. Client created in src/renderer/src/servicos/client.ts via createClient<Router>
Pattern: Service layer wraps IPC — Each domain has a service file (escalasService, setoresService) that wraps tipc client calls with type assertions
Pattern: useApiData hook — Custom hook for data fetching with loading/error/reload states. Used by all pages for initial data load
Pattern: Zustand store is minimal — Only useAppStore with setorAtivoId. Most state is local useState in page components
Pattern: shadcn/ui components in src/renderer/src/components/ui/ — 19 components installed. DropdownMenu NOT yet installed (needed for sidebar avatar)

Pattern: Custom components in src/renderer/src/componentes/ — Portuguese naming (componentes, not components). Files: AppSidebar, EscalaGrid, ExportarEscala, ErrorBoundary, PageHeader, PontuacaoBadge, StatusBadge
Pattern: snake_case end-to-end — DB columns = JSON keys = TS interface fields. No camelCase conversion anywhere
Pattern: Motor runs in Worker Thread — src/main/motor/worker.ts opens its own DB connection, runs gerarProposta, posts result back. Spawned from escalasGerar handler in tipc.ts
Pattern: Motor validation is shared — validacao-compartilhada.ts contains validarRegras() and calcularIndicadores() used by both gerador.ts and validador.ts
Pattern: CSS variables for theming — index.css has both :root (light) and .dark class (dark) CSS variables defined. next-themes is in package.json but NOT imported/used anywhere yet
Pattern: HashRouter for Electron — Uses react-router-dom HashRouter (not BrowserRouter) since it's a desktop app loading from file://
Pattern: Escalas lifecycle in 3 tabs — EscalaPagina.tsx has Simulacao (generate + adjust), Oficial (view), Historico (archived) tabs
Pattern: EscalaGrid already has onCelulaClick prop — Accepts callback (colaboradorId, data, statusAtual) but EscalaPagina.tsx NEVER passes it. Grid is read-only in practice even in Simulacao tab
findings.approach: This task has 4 parallel workstreams: (1) Motor Quality — validate gerador.ts with realistic seed data, fix bugs in folga distribution, domingo rotation, and coverage; (2) Smart Recalc — enhance escalas.ajustar IPC handler to regenerate surrounding allocations (not just upsert+revalidate), preserving manual pins; (3) Interactive Grid — wire EscalaGrid.onCelulaClick in EscalaPagina to toggle TRABALHO/FOLGA and call escalas.ajustar, showing loading state per cell; (4) UX Polish — add Avatar+Dropdown to AppSidebar footer, implement ThemeSwitcher using next-themes (already installed), add OnboardingTour component, improve loading/error states. Recommend implementing in order: UX polish first (low risk, high visibility), then Grid interactivity (medium complexity), then Motor quality (requires testing), then Smart Recalc (highest complexity, depends on motor understanding).
risks: RISK-HIGH: Smart Recalc is architecturally complex. Current escalas.ajustar just upserts + revalidates (line 470-516 of tipc.ts). Making it 'regenerate around pinned cells' requires either: (a) modifying gerarProposta to accept pinned cells as constraints, or (b) creating a new partial-regeneration function. Option (a) changes the motor's core API; option (b) duplicates logic

RISK-HIGH: Motor quality is untested with realistic data. Seed has 16 collaborators across 4 sectors, which is good for basic testing. However, edge cases (all colabs on vacation, 1 colab per sector, week boundary lookback) are not covered and could expose bugs in Fase 3/4/4.5

RISK-MEDIUM: EscalaGrid toggle (TRABALHO -> FOLGA) removes hora_inicio/hora_fim. When toggling back (FOLGA -> TRABALHO), the system needs to assign new hours. Current ajustar handler doesn't auto-assign hours — it just saves what's sent. The toggle-back case needs either: (a) frontend sends hours (but how does it know?), or (b) backend regenerates hours for that cell

RISK-MEDIUM: next-themes is installed but never integrated. Need to wrap App in ThemeProvider and ensure all shadcn/ui components + custom Tailwind classes work in dark mode. The .dark CSS vars exist in index.css, but hardcoded colors (e.g., in CORES_ALOCACAO, CORES_VIOLACAO) may not adapt properly
RISK-LOW: DropdownMenu component is not installed in shadcn/ui yet. Need to add @radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu and create the component file before building the sidebar avatar dropdown

RISK-LOW: OnboardingTour needs a tour library or custom implementation. No tour dependency exists in package.json. Could use a lightweight approach (modal with steps) or add a library like react-joyride

RISK-LOW: Escala table schema has pontuacao/cobertura_percent/violacoes_hard/violacoes_soft/equilibrio columns that are updated on ajustar — these are denormalized indicators. Any recalc must keep them in sync
dependencies: next-themes (v0.4.6) — Already in package.json, NOT used yet. Needed for ThemeSwitcher (RF10)
@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu — NOT installed. Needed for Avatar+Dropdown in sidebar (RF9)
@egoist/tipc (v0.3.2) — IPC framework. All backend communication goes through this
better-sqlite3 (v11.7.0) — Database driver. Worker thread opens its own connection
electron-vite (v3.0.0) — Build tool. Config in electron.vite.config.ts with path aliases @/ and @shared
sonner (v2.0.7) — Toast notifications. Used for all user feedback
zustand (v5.0.0) — State management. Currently minimal (only setorAtivoId). May need expansion for theme/onboarding state
react-router-dom (v7.1.0) — HashRouter. 9 routes defined in App.tsx
No tour library installed — OnboardingTour (RF13) will need either a new dependency or custom implementation

phases_implemented: Phase 4: Rodizio de Domingo com lookback (lines 286-349)
validation_rules: R8: COBERTURA por faixa de demanda — SOFT

escalas_handlers: escalas.listarPorSetor — Filter by setor_id + optional status
escalas.oficializar — Validates 0 HARD violations, archives previous OFICIAL
escalas.ajustar — CURRENT: upserts alocacoes + revalidates (NO regeneration). THIS IS THE KEY GAP
escalas.gerar — Spawns worker thread, persists result as RASCUNHO

gaps_vs_prd.RF4_domingo_rotation: PARTIAL — Phase 4 has lookback + gender limits + sort by total worked. Quality unknown
gaps_vs_prd.RF5_horario_coverage: PARTIAL — Phase 5 has coverage-first scoring with multiple candidate start times. Quality unknown
gaps_vs_prd.RF6_smart_recalc: GAP — escalas.ajustar is upsert+revalidate only. No regeneration around pinned cells
gaps_vs_prd.RF7_realtime_feedback: PARTIAL — ajustar returns updated indicators. But frontend doesn't call it (grid is non-interactive)
gaps_vs_prd.RF8_preserve_manual: GAP — No concept of 'pinned' cells. Need new mechanism to mark manual adjustments
gaps_vs_prd.RF9_sidebar_avatar: GAP — AppSidebar has no avatar, no dropdown. Footer just shows 'Empresa' text
gaps_vs_prd.RF10_theme_switcher: GAP — next-themes installed but not used. .dark CSS vars exist in index.css. No ThemeSwitcher component
gaps_vs_prd.RF11_loading_states: PARTIAL — gerando state shows 'Gerando...' on button. No spinner overlay, no descriptive message
gaps_vs_prd.RF12_human_errors: PARTIAL — ErrorBoundary exists. toast.error shows err.message. Backend errors are somewhat technical
gaps_vs_prd.RF13_onboarding_tour: GAP — No tour component, no tour library, nothing implemented
gaps_vs_prd.RF14_grid_interactive: GAP — EscalaGrid has onCelulaClick prop defined but EscalaPagina NEVER passes it. Grid is effectively read-only
gaps_vs_prd.RF15_auto_fill_period: DONE — EscalaPagina auto-fills dataInicio/dataFim with next month
gaps_vs_prd.RF16_test_cases: GAP — No test files, no test cases documented

architecture_notes.ipc_flow: Renderer → client.ts (tipc) → preload (contextBridge) → main process (tipc handlers) → DB/Motor
architecture_notes.worker_flow: escalasGerar handler → spawns Worker(worker.ts) → worker opens own DB → runs gerarProposta → posts result → main thread persists
architecture_notes.theme_integration_path: 1. Wrap App in ThemeProvider (next-themes) in main.tsx. 2. Create ThemeSwitcher component. 3. Add to AppSidebar dropdown. 4. next-themes toggles .dark class on html element. 5. CSS vars in index.css already handle both themes
architecture_notes.grid_interaction_path: 1. EscalaPagina passes onCelulaClick to EscalaGrid. 2. Click toggles TRABALHO↔FOLGA. 3. Call escalasService.ajustar with updated cell. 4. Backend revalidates (or regenerates in RF6). 5. Update escalaCompleta state with response. 6. Grid re-renders with new data
smart_recalc_options: Option A: Modify gerarProposta to accept pinnedCells Map<colabId-date, status>. Motor skips pinned cells during phases 3-5. Most correct but invasive change to motor API
Option B: New function regenerarAoRedor() that takes current alocacoes + pinned set, and only redistributes non-pinned cells. Duplicates some motor logic but isolated
Option C: Keep current upsert+revalidate but add auto-hour-assignment for FOLGA→TRABALHO toggles. Simplest, doesn't truly 'regenerate', but may satisfy UX requirements
